title: galium sylvestre var. scabrum
intro: Galium sylvestre var. scabrum, also known as rough-leaved bedstraw, is a plant species belonging to the Rubiaceae family, commonly found in mountainous regions of Europe, Asia, and North Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Galium sylvestre var. scabrum include relieving digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
